name: @laneshadow/server
description: LaneShadow backend workspace root for Convex operations

scripts.convex:dev: sh -c 'if [ ! -d convex ]; then echo "Missing server/convex. Establish backend code in a downstream restructure task before running Convex commands."; exit 1; fi; npx convex dev'
scripts.convex:deploy: sh -c 'if [ ! -d convex ]; then echo "Missing server/convex. Establish backend code in a downstream restructure task before running Convex commands."; exit 1; fi; npx convex deploy'
scripts.convex:codegen: sh -c 'if [ ! -d convex ]; then echo "Missing server/convex. Establish backend code in a downstream restructure task before running Convex commands."; exit 1; fi; npx convex codegen'
scripts.convex:dashboard: sh -c 'if [ ! -d convex ]; then echo "Missing server/convex. Establish backend code in a downstream restructure task before running Convex commands."; exit 1; fi; npx convex dashboard'
